name: testAddFraudControlToBusinessUnit
description: Add Fraud Control to Business Unit (No Fraud Control)Add Fraud Control to Business Unit (Business unit has Fraud Control)
descriptionHtml: Add Fraud Control to Business Unit (No Fraud Control)Add Fraud Control to Business Unit (Business unit has Fraud Control)

steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0826.142316.24.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Add Fraud Control to Business Unit (No Fraud Control)Add Fraud Control to Business Unit (Business unit has Fraud Control)

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Select '0826.142316 company to bend Fraud Control' company using filter
Select 'Business unit 0826.142316' business unit using filter
Verify that Fraud Control one are presented in Business Unit table
Verify that Fraud Control two are presented in Business Unit table
